_comment: DEMO DATA — simulated. Tomorrow, overwrite this file with real notebook/Jupyter exports. Keep the same keys so the React app needs no changes. See src/types.ts for the contract.
tagline: Detecting field-level regenerative agriculture signals from satellite time-series data

confidence.note: Consistent multi-season divergence from controls, but no ground-truth confirmation.

factors.label: NDVI uplift vs controls
factors.detail: +0.11 mean NDVI above the 6-field control average after the adoption window.

factors.label: Off-season vegetation
factors.detail: Green cover persists into the dry season where controls go bare.

factors.label: Reduced bare-soil window
factors.detail: Bare-soil days per year dropped from ~74 to ~31.

factors.label: Change-point detected
factors.detail: Statistical break in the NDVI series aligns with the suspected adoption window.

aiInsight.headline: Persistent divergence from neighbouring controls
aiInsight.body: The target field shows increased vegetation behaviour relative to neighbouring controls after the suspected adoption period. This suggests a possible regenerative agriculture signal, but should be validated against farm management records or ground truth.
aiInsight.model: Prewritten (no live inference in this demo)
aiInsight.disclaimer: Signal, not proof. This narrative is a heuristic summary of the metrics above.

limitations: Weather variability (rainfall, drought) can mimic or mask regenerative signals.
Crop rotation and cover cropping can raise NDVI without regenerative practices.
Sensor artefacts: clouds, shadows, and atmospheric correction add noise.
No ground truth — practices are inferred, not confirmed by the farm.
Field-boundary quality affects whether pixels represent only the target field.
nextSteps: Cross-check the suspected adoption window against farm management records.
Acquire labelled examples of confirmed regenerative fields to calibrate the score.
Run cloud/shadow masking and atmospheric QA on the raw scenes.
Refine field boundaries with higher-resolution imagery or cadastral data.
Prioritise this parcel for on-the-ground verification given its medium-high signal.

before.label: Before — pre-adoption
before.caption: Dry-season composite before the suspected adoption window. Replace with a real notebook-exported scene.

after.label: After — post-adoption
after.caption: Dry-season composite after the suspected adoption window. Replace with a real notebook-exported scene.
